title: SamsSMP
body:
On fabric based mod pack with iris.

This mod pack was created for playing on local SMP with optimization and some visual changes

 *This mod pack improves a vanilla optimization ( client side at this moment)
 *
This mod pack is based on Iris + Sodium
 *Best alternative for 1.19 survival without optifine
 

 *Faster shader change
 *More FPS
